text.message: I’m about to be so sad
Wood nb preloaded for when I 7 out
Yea imma need that back lol
mainly wanted to slow red down a bit, wasnt really the greatest timing
Black will u trade that wheat if I move knight off u?
good time to start pacing army oj
Not worth it for me then sorry
and then you get a solo in return smh
Desperate times call for desperate measures
dont even know why im popping
oj start playing devs or we will have to block u
which i produce equally on and oj is also on?
Smart of him. If it was on the other six, I’d just move it to his five or
U can’t get mad at me if ur gonna feed him knights :)
unless oj has really crazy devs
Blue is going to 8 or 7+ mono in short term but I’ll compete long term army
Can we not talk on our own turns please
No talking on your own turn please
where did you get that from red lol
of course we can talk in our turns
imagine compaining about talking in a social game lmao
I'm not complaining about talking just taking the time to type something out when you could end
taking the time to type something out when you could end turn
Black will u trade ore for 5ore block over 10 sheep?
me with army is safer than oj with army
Who will take road and win game
oj famously produces a ton of roads
unless black sneaks it before you build any more it stasy with you
im thinking oj w 4 vps man
How many vps do you have orange? So we know how many they have
yes the lack of playing knights is sus
why are u not playing your devs then
I have four nights in a VP
He was lying all along lol
“I think u have 4 vp” while he had 3 in hand
you could have dispelled it by pacing army
which i really dont understand not doing
now the game is over before you get to 6 knights
dont think oj really has those knights
and nobody else can have them
how are you trading this late man
how can neither of you do math
2 more rolls for black to get nothing lol
had i not 7d out the previous turn i would have taken road and won
